nasb.text: Then King Solomon swore by the Lord, saying, “May God do so to me and more also, if Adonijah has not spoken this word against his own life.

esv.text: Then King Solomon swore by the Lord, saying, “God do so to me and more also if this word does not cost Adonijah his life!

cnv.text: 於是所羅門王指著耶和華起誓，說：“如果亞多尼雅不因說了這話而送命，願　神懲罰我，並且加倍懲罰我。

ccb.text: 所罗门王就凭耶和华起誓说：“亚多尼雅若不为他这样的要求付出性命，愿上帝重重地惩罚我。
